backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Strange Waves platform defining core data types (AudioFile, Playlist, Album, NFT, UserProfile, etc.) and mixing in blob storage and authorization modules for audio streaming and NFT management on ICP.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature: adding a track upload form (audio, cover image, title, description) to AlbumPage.tsx that is owner-gated and immediately reflects new uploads in the track listing.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of components, hooks, pages, and utility modules in the project.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Strange Waves - Audio Streaming Platform' and mounting the app at the #root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component implementing page-based routing via useState, rendering AlbumPage for 'album/<id>' routes and dedicated pages for music-mints, fan-connect, about, merch, socials, and a default home view with hero section.
frontend/src/components/AudioLibrary.tsx: Tabbed audio library component displaying local canister files, Audius search results, and playlists; supports NFT minting via dialog and only triggers Audius searches when the Audius tab is active.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: HTML5 audio player component supporting local, remote canister, and Audius stream sources with playback controls, seek/volume sliders, and dynamic cover image loading from blob data.
frontend/src/components/AudioUploader.ts: A React component that handles audio file uploads with drag-and-drop support, optional cover image attachment, metadata input (title, creator, visibility), upload progress tracking, and an NFT minting dialog trigger.
frontend/src/components/CanisterInfoModa: A dialog modal that displays the current backend canister ID and user principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons, and provides a disconnect option to clear the Internet Identity session.
frontend/src/components/CanisterSettings: A settings dialog that allows users to save and clear a live backend canister ID to localStorage, showing connection status and the currently saved ID.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled component errors, logs detailed diagnostics, and renders a fallback UI with error details and a page-reload reset button.
frontend/src/components/ExternalAudioPla: A standalone audio player component designed for external embedding that streams audio from an Internet Computer canister, fetches file metadata, and provides play/pause, seek, and volume controls.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component that renders a copyright notice with a heart icon and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GlobalFallbackUI: A full-screen error fallback UI component that displays error details, user recovery suggestions, and provides options to retry/reload or copy a diagnostic error report to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with a navigation dropdown menu (including an albums sub-menu fetched from the backend), theme toggle, login button, and modals for canister info and settings.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout using the useInternetIdentity hook, showing the user's truncated principal when authenticated and displaying loading states.
frontend/src/components/NFTMintDialog.ts: A dialog form for minting audio NFTs, allowing users to configure title, artist, description, mint type, price, stablecoin, royalty percentage, and revenue splits before submitting.
A full-featured playlist management UI supporting create, rename, delete, and track management (local and Audius) for authenticated users, with embed code generation and expandable playlist views.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A simple icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/components/WalletDisplay.ts: A wallet UI component displaying the user's principal address, token balances (ICP, CHAT, ckBTC, ckUSDC), owned NFTs, and mock transaction history with refresh and copy-address functionality.
frontend/src/components/WalletManager.ts: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts: Wrapper hook around useActor that exposes additional readiness state flags (isActorReady, isActorInitializing) and logs actor initialization status for debugging.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and exposing status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central data-fetching module exposing React Query hooks and mutations for audio files, albums, NFTs, genres, playlists, and Audius integration, plus a global selected-audio state and an action queue processor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWallet.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, accent, etc.).
frontend/src/lib/audioApiClient.ts: Utility module providing functions to list audio files, fetch metadata, and generate streaming URLs from the backend canister actor, intended for external application integration.
frontend/src/lib/audiusApi.ts: Audius public API integration module with functions to search tracks, fetch trending tracks, retrieve track metadata, and generate stream URLs.
frontend/src/lib/diagnostics.ts: Provides a runtime diagnostics and health check system that logs component initialization results, checks DOM elements, React rendering status, and browser feature compatibility.
frontend/src/lib/icpBridgeAdapter.ts: Handles conversion of ICP DIP-721 NFT metadata into Lukso LSP7/LSP8-compatible schemas, providing utilities to fetch canister metadata and export NFTs across the two ecosystems.
frontend/src/lib/luksoProfileSync.ts: Manages linking of ICP Principals to Lukso Universal Profile addresses via cryptographic signatures, following LSP3 guidelines for identity verification and profile storage.
frontend/src/lib/nftMirrorService.ts: Implements bidirectional NFT metadata synchronization between ICP and Lukso, tracking mirror records and sync history to keep LSP8-mirrored assets consistent with their DIP-721 originals.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers, mounting the App component into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AlbumPage.tsx: Renders an album detail page with a track list, inline audio playback controls, and an admin upload form for adding new tracks to a specific album.
frontend/src/pages/FanConnect.tsx: File appears to be empty or truncated with no visible content.
frontend/src/pages/MusicMints.tsx: React page that displays all minted music NFTs grouped by type (audio, image, combined) in tabs, with playback controls and a detail dialog showing metadata like price, date, and owner.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the SScc music/NFT app, tracking existing features, a pending album-page track upload feature request, known build failures, and architectural notes.
